milestones.text: Project start — KtToPy transpiler scaffold (parse → map handlers).
Connectivity-checked reuse workflow is real and tooled (DevComms log_48).
Whole WFL app transpiles → WFL_MixingCenter (transpile_app.py); PROJECT_MAP corrected.
SharedFlow-nav done; exercise_detail remainder scoped per-screen.
resolve phase + wrapper registry → real imports emitted (load ≠ run closed; 0 non-UI gaps).
Data layer RUNS end-to-end — sqlite3-backed Room; the project's own DAO/txn instrumented tests pass headless.
Numeric fidelity (1/2): fixed-width wrappers emitted at literals (Int32/Int64/Float32).
Numeric fidelity (2/2): declared-type coercion at param/constructor/val boundaries (literal-free chains carry width).
Measured dashboard (track.py): gates re-run on demand, trend charts + on-deck queue.
